Notice Of Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate (Ccp Section 1094.5) And Writ Of Mandate (Ccp Section 1085)
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Theodore Ray 302-470-0476 Petitioner in Pro Per.
Jessica Doker, Esq., Deputy Attorney General Tel:415-510-3455 for Respondent.

Hearing is held. The Petitioner failed to timely contest the Court's tentative ruling. TThe matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER THEODORE RAY's Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate (CCP Section 1094.5) And Writ Of Mandate (CCP Section 1085) is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

**An ORDER DENYING THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS SIGNED AFTER THE HEARING.**

Notice Of Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate (Ccp Section 1094.5) And Writ Of Mandate (Ccp Section 1085)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Continued To Mar-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate (Ccp Section 1094.5) And Writ Of Mandate (Ccp Section 1085)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Continued To Jul-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Theodore Ray 302-470-0476 Petitioner in Pro Per.
Jessica Doker, Esq. 415-510-3455 Deputy Attorney General for Respondent.

Hearing is held. The Court announces the Court has no papers and explains the procedure on the Petition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER THEODORE's Hearing For Writ Of Administrative Mandate (Ccp Section 1094.5) And Writ Of Mandate (Ccp Section 1085).

Continued to 7/2/25 at 9am. Respondent's counsel Ms. Doker to submit the administrative record by 5/20/25. If an administrative record is not lodged by Respondent, Petitioner's papers will be treated as the administrative record. Petitioner no further brief. Respondent's opposition brief due by 6/10/25. Petitioner's repluy brief by 6/20/25. Ms. Doker to prepare a proposed order.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
